creator: rkoberman@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 237880
core.txt from crash at interface startup

I am again able to trigger this crash. It turns out that it is intermittent which is why my attempt to bisect filed. Crash is the most common case, but it works a significant part of the time.

I now have good crash dump. I see that there is a very similar report in bug 237862. Thar report in on 13.1-Stable while mine is on main, but both are showing the same console output and similar, but not identical dumps. core.txt.9 is the core from the crash on boot case.
